mapper.select: SELECT * FROM guide_tag WHERE guide_id IS NULL ORDER BY category, sort_order
SELECT * FROM guide_tag WHERE guide_id IS NULL AND category = #{category} ORDER BY sort_order
SELECT * FROM guide_tag WHERE guide_id = #{guideId} ORDER BY category, sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO guide_tag (id, guide_id, name, category, sort_order) VALUES (#{id}, #{guideId}, #{name}, #{category}, #{sortOrder})
mapper.update: UPDATE guide_tag SET name=#{name}, category=#{category}, sort_order=#{sortOrder} WHERE id=#{id}
UPDATE guide_tag SET id = id - 1 WHERE id > #{afterId}
